summary: RL Trading Stats API endpoint fully tested. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Endpoint GET /api/rl/trading-stats?hours={1,6,24} returns correct structure with hold_stats, pnl_stats, fee_stats, sell_sources, trade_counts, performance, rl_metrics, and health status. No-data case returns warning status with 'no_data' reason as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:2377-2779 - GET /api/rl/trading-stats endpoint fully implemented with comprehensive response structure
server.py:2594-2596 - Fee ratio calculation documented: (total_fees / total_notional) * 100
server.py:2626-2695 - Health status logic correctly implements healthy/warning/critical with contextual reasons
server.py:2412-2487 - No-data case properly returns zeroed values with warning status and 'no_data' reason
seed_data_creation: Created test user rlstats_test@example.com for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: RL Trading Stats API fully tested. Endpoint works correctly for all three time periods (1h, 6h, 24h). Response includes 8 main data sections: hold_stats, pnl_stats, fee_stats, sell_sources, trade_counts, performance, rl_metrics, health. The no-data case returns warning status with 'no_data' reason. Test credentials: rlstats_test@example.com/TestPass123!

GET /api/rl/trading-stats?hours=1.details: Returns 200 with correct period_hours=1 and full response structure

GET /api/rl/trading-stats?hours=6.details: Returns 200 with correct period_hours=6 and full response structure

GET /api/rl/trading-stats?hours=24.details: Returns 200 with correct period_hours=24 and full response structure

Response structure - pnl_stats.details: Contains avg/total net and theoretical PnL in USDT and %

Response structure - rl_metrics.details: Contains exploration/exploitation ratios and duration by outcome

No-data case.details: Returns warning status with 'no_data' reason and zeroed values

Default hours parameter.details: Defaults to 24 hours when no parameter provided

critical_triggers: Profit factor very low (< 0.5) with >= 5 trades
Avg hold too short (< 60s) with >= 5 trades
warning_triggers: Large gap between theoretical and net PnL (> 0.3%)
Avg hold near minimum (< 90s) with >= 5 trades
